title: Ramón Galán
text: Home * People * Ramón Galán Ramón Galán [1] Ramón Galán , a Spanish computer scientist and full professor in the area of systems engineering at Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM). His main research areas have been in the area of process control , artificial intelligence , expert systems , and interactive Robots . In their 2005 paper, Bitboards: A New Approach [2] , Ramón Galán and Pablo San Segundo mention Bitscan by Modulo for finding 1-bits in a practically no space consuming way, not yet aware of De Bruijn multiplication [3] .
